symptom: a rapidly swelling painful leg with a foul wound after an injury
hook: the muscles of the limb were full of spreading gas bubbles
whatYouSee: Bubbles of gas spreading through the muscles of the limb.
whyItMatters: Gas in the muscle means a fast spreading flesh eating infection that can kill within hours.
treatment: It needs emergency surgery to cut away dead tissue plus strong antibiotics.
takeaway: Gas bubbles tracking through the muscles is gas gangrene a surgical emergency.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a rapidly swelling painful leg with a foul wound after an injury.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And the muscles of the limb were full of spreading gas bubbles.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Gas gangrene

👀 What you see:
Bubbles of gas spreading through the muscles of the limb.

🦴 Why it matters:
Gas in the muscle means a fast spreading flesh eating infection that can kill within hours.

💊 Treatment:
It needs emergency surgery to cut away dead tissue plus strong antibiotics.
